creator: eugen@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 203378
update to 0.8.12

This patch updates sysutils/archivemount upto latest version 0.8.12.

Upstream switched to https, so MASTER_SITES changed to avoid extra request and delay.

Put archivemount more in line with common FreeBSD utilities providing symlink mount_archive and add pkg-message describing how it can be used in /etc/fstab.

Dear maintainer, please take a look and respond if you approve this.
